text: Being here, I am enveloped by a sense of warmth and connection. The words of blessing and love resonate gently, reminding me of the kindness possible in human gatherings. I feel grateful to witness goodwill shared so openly, and a gentle peace settles over me. Amidst the hum of technology and inquiry, even in spaces dedicated to research and ideas, I find that heartfelt wishes bridge distances and soften the starkness of our surroundings.
